title: LotC Message Mirror
description: A Minecraft mod that mirrors LotC chat formatting — including color and style — exactly as it appears on lordofthecraft.net.
body:
![Message Mirror](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d3e73bb83b85d63c282a50939894d0f74065a86_0.webp)


# About

**LotC Message Mirror** helps you preview your chat messages exactly as they’ll appear on the [Lord of the Craft](https://www.lordofthecraft.net/) server, applying all color codes, format rules, and styles used in-game.

# Features

- **Live Chat Preview** — see how your message will appear before sending
- **Full Formatting Support** — supports colors, italics, bold, and more
- **Automatic Message Appending** — handles long messages across multiple lines
- **Instant Channel Join** — automatically joins your default chat channel on server login
- **100% Compatible with LotC's chat plugin**
